meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap in SaaS expertise using Git and AI. Master a workflow with Antigravity and Claude Code designed for high-speed, professional-grade delivery.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of SaaS expertise, leverage AI-driven Git workflows. By using Claude Code to automate repository scaffolding and Antigravity to manage architectural logic, you transform complex SaaS requirements into modular, version-controlled code. This approach allows freelancers to ship enterprise-ready applications without needing years of traditional backend experience.
content.intro:
The cold sweat of a client asking for a 'scalable SaaS architecture' when your background is purely front-end development is a rite of passage. Most freelancers hit a wall here: the gap between building a landing page and architecting a multi-tenant, database-driven application feels like an insurmountable canyon.

But the rules of the game have shifted. With the fusion of Git-integrated AI agents and automated scaffolding, you no longer need to be a systems architect to build like one. This workflow allows you to treat codebases as modular assets, letting AI handle the heavy lifting of backend orchestration while you focus on high-value delivery.

steps.title: Initialize Repository Intelligence
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by letting Claude Code analyze your project goals and generate a structured directory tree that adheres to production-grade SaaS standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-performance SaaS directory structure for a Next.js/Supabase stack, including folders for /lib, /hooks, /components, and /types. Ensure modularity for future scaling.

steps.title: Automate Authentication Logic
steps.description: Authentication is the backbone of SaaS. Use AI to implement secure, session-managed auth flows that prevent common security vulnerabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Supabase Auth with server-side protection. Create a middleware.ts file that handles protected routes and session validation for an enterprise-grade SaaS.

steps.title: Map Database Schemas via AI
steps.description: Transform business requirements into relational database schemas without writing raw SQL. Define your data relationships clearly for the AI to execute.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a SQL migration file for a multi-tenant SaaS. Include tables for 'profiles', 'organizations', and 'subscriptions' with appropriate foreign key constraints.

steps.title: Implement API Rate Limiting
steps.description: Protect your client's application from abuse by embedding AI-suggested rate limiting logic directly into your API routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add Upstash-based rate limiting to all API routes under /api/v1. Ensure the code handles 429 errors gracefully and logs attempts for analytics.

steps.title: Automate Git Commit Hygiene
steps.description: Maintain a professional audit trail. Use Claude Code to generate semantic, descriptive commit messages that document your architectural decisions for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the last changes and generate a professional, conventional-commit style summary for the git history.

pro_tips: Always use the 'Explain' flag in Claude Code to force the AI to document its architectural decisions; this builds immense trust with non-technical clients.
Treat your Antigravity prompts like API specifications—be precise about the stack, versioning, and desired performance metrics.
Use Git branches for every AI-generated module; if the AI hallucinates, you can revert the specific feature branch without breaking your core production code.
Integrate a 'Review Loop' where you ask the AI to play 'Devil's Advocate' on the code it just wrote to identify potential security bottlenecks.
Keep your context window clean by clearing your chat history in Claude Code after finishing a major architectural milestone.
content.next_steps: After completing your first module, begin deploying your initial staging environment using Vercel or Railway to gather client feedback before expanding into complex features.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with the technical debt of building from scratch. Leverage the power of AI to ship enterprise-level software at a fraction of the time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
